# shinyphaser ![shinyphaser Logo](reference/figures/shinyphaser.png)

This package provides a R Shiny interface to Phaser 3 game framework.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`PhaserGame`](PhaserGame.md) : PhaserGame
- [`phaser_create_assets()`](phaser_create_assets.md) : Create assets
  folder in your project

# Articles

### Getting started

- [Build your first shinyphaser game (hedgehog
  vignette)](first-game-hedgehog.md):
